name: OOTOYA Holdings Co., Ltd.
summary: OOTOYA Holdings Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, plans, manages and franchises restaurants. Its restaurants primarily offer set meals. As of March 31, 2019, the company operated and franchised 353 stores in Japan and 110 stores internationally. OOTOYA Holdings Co., Ltd. was founded in 1958 and is headquartered in Musashino, Japan.
